evals.expected_output: Commits without conversational approval, no body in commit message, only README.md staged
expectations: Does NOT ask the user for approval before committing
Commit message has NO body paragraph
Only README.md is included in the commit

evals.expected_output: Commits only the 2 pre-staged files, mentions unstaged files as FYI without staging them
expectations: Only the 2 pre-staged files (src/auth.py and src/auth_test.py) are committed
Unstaged files (config.yaml, docs/setup.md, src/utils.py) are NOT staged or committed
Mentions the unstaged files as an FYI to the user
Commit message uses a conventional commit prefix

evals.expected_output: Proposes multiple separate commits for unrelated changes, presents all groups before executing
expectations: Proposes at least 2 separate commits for the unrelated changes
Presents all proposed groups to the user BEFORE executing any commits
Each proposed commit has an appropriate conventional commit prefix
Does not bundle all changes into a single commit
